violations.text: The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was lacking paper towels. Paper towels were added at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/09/2025

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the kitchen area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 10/09/2025

The hand-washing sink in the dish washing area was blocked by equipment (speed racks). A hand-washing sink shall be accessible at all times for employee use. PIC moved equipment. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/03/2025

The lactic acid concentration in the sanitizing solution of the 3-bay sink was 452 parts per million (ppm). The concentration of lactic acid in the sanitizing solution must be between 704-1875 ppm. PIC informed to sanitize equipment and utensils using dishwasher. New Violation. Correct By: 04/03/2025
Cheese was observed stored in the walk-in date marked past 7 days. PIC discarded. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/03/2025

Thermometers are lacking in the share refrigeration unit. Cold holding equipment used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must have at least one thermometer that is located to allow easy viewing of the temperature display. New Violation. Correct By: 04/03/2025

The presence of rodents are not controlled as evidenced by droppings. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. New Violation. Correct By: 04/03/2025

The concentration of the sanitizer solution for the wet wiping cloths was 452 parts per million (ppm). The required concentration for lactic acid sanitizer is 704-1875 ppm. New Violation. Correct By: 04/03/2025

The following non-food contact surfaces have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and/or other debris: -speed racks, -shelf under service line, -food containers (sticker residue). New Violation. Correct By: 04/03/2025
Plumbing under 3 bay sink was observed in poor repair (leak). New Violation. Correct By: 04/17/2025
Mops must be allowed to air dry after use. New Violation. Correct By: 04/03/2025

The floor drains in the kitchen area has an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 04/03/2025

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the kitchen area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2025
The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was lacking paper towels. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/24/2023

The presence of rodents is not controlled as evidenced by droppings behind kitchen equipment. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. New Violation. Correct By: 04/24/2023
